stories.title: Replace FluentProvider with GCThemeProvider in App.tsx
Replace raw Button with EvaButton in App.tsx navigation
Add AI Assistant view to App.tsx
Add EVA-STORY tags to all source files

tasks.title: PLAN.md ? all phases, features, stories with IDs
Steps: checkout, node 20, `npm ci --legacy-peer-deps`, `npm run build`, `npm run lint`

acceptance.text: `App.tsx` uses `FluentProvider` or `GCThemeProvider` as root theme wrapper
3-step wizard renders: workspace selection → entry survey → confirm
`ExitSurveyDialog.tsx` uses only Fluent UI dialog, fields, radio groups
`TeamManagementDialog.tsx` uses Fluent UI member form, role select, badges
`MyBookings.tsx` renders booking cards with status badges using Fluent UI
`AdminDashboard.tsx` renders stat cards, utilization bars, bookings table
App renders with correct token values
All nav tab buttons in `App.tsx` use `EvaButton` from `@eva/ui`
`BRAIN_BASE` reads from `VITE_BRAIN_BASE_URL` env var with fallback to `/api/brain`
Path rewrite strips `/api/brain` prefix before forwarding
`npm run dev` auto-proxies brain calls in development
Offline state shows warning banner and disables `Textarea`
Conversation history array passed on every `chatUngrounded()` call
5 starter suggestion chips shown on empty conversation
Error responses render in visually distinct error bubble
`SparkleRegular` icon used for AI Assistant nav tab
`PLAN.md` created with phases, features F46-01 to F46-06, all stories with IDs
`STATUS.md` created with session snapshots and open items table
`ACCEPTANCE.md` created with DoD checklist per story
All 7 screen components have `// EVA-STORY: F46-XX-XXX` + `// EVA-FEATURE: F46-XX`
No raw `Button` import from `@fluentui/react-components` in this file
Triggers on push and PR to `main`
Steps: checkout, Node 20, `npm ci --legacy-peer-deps`, `npm run build`, `npm run lint`
`npm run build` exits 0 — no TypeScript errors, no Vite build errors
`npm run lint` exits 0 — no ESLint errors
No encoding violations in committed files (ASCII-only for machine-readable outputs)
`STATUS.md` updated with session summary before closing
